payload.answer: Extracted durable architecture decisions: Brain DB is the source of truth, Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection, and Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Preserved Telegram addition and cheapest performant model selection as open questions.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent
Open questions - Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?
payload.decision: Commit the stated architecture roles as durable memory; preserve Telegram and model-choice items as open questions, not decisions.

payload.intent: Extract durable architectural decisions and open questions from a chat summary about Brain architecture.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain architecture.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection, not the source of truth.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for Brain.
It is unresolved whether Telegram should be added later.
It is unresolved which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: Committed three architecture decisions as memory cards.
Preserved two unresolved items as open questions.
No superseded or deleted facts were presented as current.
